wanted.name: TradeTracker
wanted.note: Global, NL-headquartered. SOAP-based but functional; affiliate.tradetracker.com/webService.

wanted.name: Adcell
wanted.note: DACH network (now under mrge holding). API exists for publishers but docs are dashboard-gated — expect reverse-engineering.

wanted.name: ClickBank
wanted.note: Digital products giant. Analytics + Order APIs are public; no dev key required since 2023.

wanted.name: Amazon Creators API
wanted.note: Successor to PA-API (which deprecates 15 May 2026). Docs at affiliate-program.amazon.com/creatorsapi/docs.

wanted.name: TUNE (HasOffers)
wanted.note: Long-running CPA platform. Public REST docs at developers.tune.com.

wanted.name: ShopMy
wanted.note: US creator network. OAuth-based creator/brand API, public docs at docs.shopmy.us.

wanted.name: Tolt
wanted.note: SaaS-focused affiliate platform. Bearer-auth REST, public docs at docs.tolt.com.

wanted.name: Refersion
wanted.note: Shopify-heavy affiliate platform. Full public docs at refersion.dev.

wanted.name: Tapfiliate
wanted.note: Mid-market multi-platform. v1.6 X-Api-Key REST, public docs at tapfiliate.com/docs/rest.

wanted.name: Howl (Narrativ)
wanted.note: Independent creator / journalist link network. API key + REST documented at docs.narrativ.com.

wanted.name: Involve Asia
wanted.note: APAC's growing network. Public REST docs.

wanted.name: ShareASale
wanted.note: Major US network (Awin-owned but a separate account + API). Self-serve Reporting API keyed by Affiliate ID + Token + Secret Key, generated in Tools > API Reporting (account.shareasale.com/a-apimanager.cfm). On wecantrack; not the same surface as the existing Awin adapter.

wanted.name: Pepperjam (Ascend by Partnerize)
wanted.note: US network, now branded Ascend by Partnerize but a distinct API from the existing Partnerize adapter. REST at api.pepperjamnetwork.com; API key self-issued in Resources > API Keys (ascend.pepperjam.com/affiliate/api/). Docs: ascendpartner.zendesk.com API Overview.

wanted.name: AvantLink
wanted.note: US/outdoor-niche network. Self-serve REST API; publisher modules include Affiliate Report, Transaction Inquiry, Product Search (support.avantlink.com API Module docs).

wanted.name: Digistore24
wanted.note: German digital-products giant. Full self-serve developer portal (dev.digistore24.com) + Swagger; API key created in-dashboard. Affiliate + vendor sales data.

wanted.name: Belboon
wanted.note: DACH performance network. wecantrack pulls conversions via the Belboon API on a schedule; confirm self-serve key issuance + endpoint before building.

wanted.name: financeAds
wanted.note: DACH finance-vertical network. API integration offered via wecantrack; verify public self-serve API docs before building.

wanted.name: Yieldkit
wanted.note: Link-monetisation network (Skimlinks/Sovrn competitor; now owns Digidip). wecantrack connects via the Yieldkit API and matches commissions per session; verify self-serve API docs.
